item.title: Advanced Data Mining with Artificial Intelligence (BAT51201)
item.description: This course is an introductory graduate-level course on data mining and artificial intelligence, specialized for the students majoring in management. In this course, students will learn the most basic and core deep learning techniques and examine how deep learning techniques can improve business problem-solving and decision-making. Moreover, the students will study practical examples to place data analysis in business context. In specific, this course covers the concepts and applications of data preprocessing, regression analysis, clustering, neural networks, CNN, and RNN. To achieve these objectives, this course uses a combination of lectures, in-class exercises, case studies, class discussions, assignment, exam (Lecture Code Link).

item.title: Analytics Programming with Application (BAT563001)
item.description: This course aims to equip students with the fundamental skills required for data analytics using Python. Emphasis will be placed on understanding and applying Python programming concepts and techniques to manipulate, analyze, and visualize data (Lecture Code Link).

item.title: Text Mining (BAT54201)
item.description: This course aims to equip students with the fundamental skills required for NLP using Python. Emphasis will be placed on understanding and applying Python programming concepts and techniques to manipulate, analyze, and visualize text data (Lecture Code Link).
